overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character traversing a desolate, rocky mountain landscape during a light snowfall. The character carries a large backpack with glowing elements and navigates uneven volcanic terrain, transitioning from open valleys to scrambling over rocks and descending into a narrow canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open volcanic mountain valley with scattered rocks

events.description: light snow begins falling, visible as white particles in the air

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open valley toward distant mountain peaks, backpack swaying with each step

entered.detail: jagged mountain silhouettes forming the horizon line against grey sky
large grey rocks strewn across the dark volcanic soil
uneven dark gravel and stone ground surface
patches of brown dormant vegetation between rocks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, desolate mountain valley under an overcast winter sky. The character walks forward through rocky terrain scattered with boulders and patches of dead grass, with jagged mountain peaks visible in the distance. Light snow falls gently throughout the scene.

events.description: terrain becomes rockier as character approaches large cliff formation on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while navigating around larger rock formations, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall vertical rock face with rough texture rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a mountainside where the open valley gives way to a more enclosed space dominated by a large cliff wall on the right. The terrain remains rocky and uneven, with the distant peaks now visible to the left as the path curves slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky incline requiring hand-over-hand climbing

events.description: character transitions from walking to scrambling up a steep rock face
camera briefly obscured by rock wall as character climbs past overhang

agents.ego_description: climbing up a steep rocky incline using hands and feet, backpack shifting with the effort

entered.detail: elevated rock platform serving as the climbing destination
deep rocky gorge visible when looking down from the climb

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a steep rock face, transitioning from walking to climbing. The camera follows closely as the character scrambles up the incline, with the cliff wall now very close on the right. Upon reaching the ledge, a view opens up to a canyon below.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between high walls

events.description: character jumps down from ledge into the narrow canyon below

agents.ego_description: carefully descending into the canyon and navigating through the narrow passage between rock walls

entered.detail: tight vertical rock walls forming a passage on the left side
tight vertical rock walls forming a passage on the right side
large rock blocking part of the path through the canyon

segments.scene_description: After jumping down from the ledge, the character enters a narrow canyon enclosed by high rock walls on both sides. The path winds through tight passages with large boulders obstructing the way, creating a claustrophobic environment compared to the open valley at the start.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate mountain valley that gradually narrows as it hugs a towering cliffside. It begins in a wide, open expanse under an overcast winter sky, where the character treks across rocky terrain scattered with boulders and patches of dead grass. As the character moves forward through a gentle snowfall, the open vista begins to contract, shifting the perspective toward the jagged mountain peaks in the distance. The scene then transitions from the broad valley to a more enclosed mountainside, where a massive cliff wall rises on the right and the path curves slightly to follow the rugged terrain.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends a steep cliffside before descending into the confines of a narrow canyon. It begins with the character scrambling up a steep rock face, the camera following closely as the cliff wall presses in from the right. As the character reaches the ledge, the perspective momentarily opens to reveal a wide view of the canyon below. The scene then shifts as the character jumps down, transitioning from the open height into a claustrophobic environment enclosed by high rock walls. Finally, the camera tracks the character winding through tight passages and navigating around large boulders that obstruct the path.
